name: Chicken and Sweet Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 1 can (10 oz.) Water chestnuts, drained and sliced
10 oz. Cream of chicken soup or white sauce with a chicken flavor
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a medium bowl, combine the mashed sweet potatoes, brown sugar, cinnamon, nutmeg, and evaporated milk.
3. Spread the mixture around the inside edge of a round 10-inch casserole dish, forming a ring.
4. In a medium non-stick skillet, heat the chicken broth over low heat. Add the onion and water chestnuts; cook until tender.
5. Stir in the cream of chicken soup or white sauce with a chicken flavor, cubed chicken, and 3 tablespoons water. Cook over medium heat until hot, stirring occasionally.
6. Spoon the chicken mixture into the center of the sweet potato ring in the casserole dish.
7. Bake uncovered for 30 minutes or until bubbling.
